mapper.insert: insert into agent_file (resource_id, user_id, conversation_id, message_id, dify_conversation_id, dify_file_id, tool_name, file_name, storage_name, relative_path, extension, media_type, file_kind, file_size, file_hash, preview_mode, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{resourceId}, #{userId}, #{conversationId}, #{messageId}, #{difyConversationId}, #{difyFileId}, #{toolName}, #{fileName}, #{storageName}, #{relativePath}, #{extension}, #{mediaType}, #{fileKind}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{previewMode}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from agent_file where resource_id = #{resourceId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'AVAILABLE' limit 1
select * from agent_file where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'AVAILABLE' order by create_time desc, id desc
mapper.update: update agent_file set status = 'DELETED', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where resource_id = #{resourceId} and user_id = #{userId} and status = 'AVAILABLE'
